heading: Upper Scamander vs Upper Stowport — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Scamander, Tasmania and Upper Stowport, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Stowport has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Upper Scamander (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Scamander or Upper Stowport safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Scamander has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Upper Stowport scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Scamander scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Stowport scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Scamander or Upper Stowport?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Stowport has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
